data.content: Pushed 15e6da8 to main. Adds isQueueOrTerminal() to workflows.ts and enforceQueueTerminalInvariant() to terminal-manager.ts. Every agent prompt now includes a CRITICAL INVARIANT instruction. The take-loop exit paths all enforce the invariant: if a beat is left in an action state, it is force-rolled-back to the queue state. Tests pass (15 tests in workflow-step.test.ts, 1646 total). 0 lint errors, 0 type errors, build succeeds.
